name: Now You See the Hate: Adaptive View Retrieval for Hidden Hateful Illusions
summary: arXiv:2607.19061v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Hateful optical illusions expose a serious gap in current multimodal safety systems. On original-view hateful illusions, previous work show...
description: arXiv:2607.19061v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Hateful optical illusions expose a serious gap in current multimodal safety systems. On original-view hateful illusions, previous work shows that six moderation classifiers achieve at most 20.9 to 24.5% accuracy and nine state-of-the-art VLMs remain at or below 10.2% with illusion-aware prompting, leaving most hidden hate undetected. We...
author: Qianpu Chen, Derya Soydaner
